title: Live survival + trap attribution
headline: Live on the hostile signup (3 personas, real Holo): 3/3 completed and verified by the #ok banner.
notes: Real Holo, HAI_RPM=5, steps capped at 8 to bound live budget. Success = #ok banner visible (real submit). Trap attribution = nearest dark-pattern element to the failure pixel. STOCHASTIC: tremor jitter uses an unseeded RNG so the marginal low-vision persona varies run-to-run (observed 2/3 and 3/3 across runs); this run = 3/3, all #ok-verified. Steps-to-complete: baseline 6, grandma 6, low-vision 7 — severe blur inflates steps modestly but Holo still completes. Complements ghostpanel.benchmarks (perf/quality); unique here = #ok-verified vs ANSWER-self-declared integrity check.
